sql.query: SELECT t.id,t.workflowId,t.workflowStageId,t.taskName,t.description,t.status,t.priority,t.isRequired,t.assignedToUserId,t.assignedToTeamId,t.assignedToRoleId,CASE WHEN t.assignedToUserId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('user:',t.assignedToUserId) WHEN t.assignedToTeamId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('team:',t.assignedToTeamId) WHEN t.assignedToRoleId IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('role:',t.assignedToRoleId) ELSE 'unassigned:' END AS assignmentKey,t.locationMode,t.locationId,t.spaceId,t.configurationId,w.locationId AS inheritedLocationId,w.spaceId AS inheritedSpaceId,w.configurationId AS inheritedConfigurationId,CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.locationId ELSE w.locationId END AS effectiveLocationId,CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.spaceId ELSE w.spaceId END AS effectiveSpaceId,CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.configurationId ELSE w.configurationId END AS effectiveConfigurationId,COALESCE(NULLIF(CONCAT_WS(' / ',el.locationName,es.spaceName,ec.configurationName),''),(SELECT CONCAT('Legacy location: ',fv.valueText) FROM tbl_workflow_field_values fv WHERE fv.workflowId=w.id AND fv.tenantId=w.tenantId AND fv.fieldKey='venue' AND NULLIF(fv.valueText,'') IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1),'No location recorded') AS effectiveLocation,t.dueDate,t.startedDate,t.completedDate,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,ws.stageName FROM tbl_tasks t INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=t.workflowId AND w.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_stages ws ON ws.id=t.workflowStageId AND ws.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_locations el ON el.id=CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.locationId ELSE w.locationId END AND el.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_spaces es ON es.id=CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.spaceId ELSE w.spaceId END AND es.locationId=CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.locationId ELSE w.locationId END AND es.tenantId=t.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_space_configurations ec ON ec.id=CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.configurationId ELSE w.configurationId END AND ec.spaceId=CASE WHEN t.locationMode='override' THEN t.spaceId ELSE w.spaceId END AND ec.tenantId=t.tenantId WHERE t.id=:id AND t.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
